creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 222662
Add VTK to bsd.default-versions.mk

(In reply to alt2600 from comment #33)
> I attempted VTK but I have to use 8 and this thing didn't seem to accept VTK_DIR being set so I gave up for now.
> Cannot test vtk 9 the other user suggested as it would break my entire system just to install it given my firm dependancies on vtk8. 
We can add default version of VTK.
